'''Jigger Wraith''' was a particularly notorious [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who plagued the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] in the era of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

Due to the fact that he utilized a specialized form of weapon known as a [[Mandalorian ripper]], a particularly vicious disruptor pistol, some thirty-seven [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] were mistaken for him and unfairly executed before sightings of Wraith ultimately declined.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
